title: ElitePvP
description: This Fabric modpack is focused on high performance, smooth gameplay, and quality-of-life improvements, using mods like Sodium, Lithium, Iris, and FerriteCore for major FPS and optimization boosts. It also adds useful features and visuals such as minimaps,
body:
# ⚔️ ElitePvP Fabric

ElitePvP Fabric is a high-performance, competitive Minecraft Fabric modpack created for players who want maximum FPS, minimal input delay, and a clean PvP experience. This modpack is built from the ground up for duels, SMP PvP, Crystal PvP, and competitive servers, where every frame and every click matters.

## 🚀 Built for Performance

ElitePvP Fabric uses industry-leading optimization mods to ensure smooth gameplay even during the most intense fights:

- Sodium – Ultra-fast rendering for massive FPS gains
- Lithium – Improves game logic and server performance
- FerriteCore – Reduces memory usage and stuttering
- ImmediatelyFast – Speeds up UI and rendering tasks
- Krypton – Network optimizations for lower latency
- EntityCulling – Prevents rendering entities you can’t see
- Dynamic FPS – Saves resources when the game is unfocused

These optimizations allow ElitePvP Fabric to run smoothly on both high-end and low-end systems, without sacrificing vanilla mechanics.

## ⚔️ PvP-Focused Quality of Life

Every feature in this modpack is chosen to support competitive play, not replace skill:
- Xaero’s Minimap & Xaero’s World Map for clean, lightweight awareness
- BetterF3 for a readable and customizable debug screen
- Mouse Tweaks for fast and efficient inventory management
- Mod Menu for quick and easy access to mod settings

Nothing overpowered, nothing unfair — just tools that help you perform at your best.

## 🎧 Multiplayer Ready

Coordinate with teammates and stay connected during fights:
- Simple Voice Chat – Proximity voice chat for real-time communication

## 🎨 Clean Visuals & Customization

ElitePvP Fabric keeps visuals sharp and PvP-friendly, with optional enhancements:
- Iris Shaders – Optional shader support without heavy FPS loss
- Indium – Full compatibility between Sodium and other rendering mods
- Visual clarity is always prioritized over flashy effects.

## 🧠 Stable & Reliable

Behind the scenes, ElitePvP Fabric is powered by essential backend mods to ensure stability and compatibility:
- Fabric API – Core modding framework
- Cloth Config API – Advanced and user-friendly configuration menus

## 🏆 Why Choose ElitePvP Fabric?

- ✔ Optimized for competitive PvP
- ✔ Extremely high FPS & low latency
- ✔ Clean, vanilla-faithful combat
- ✔ Lightweight and stable
- ✔ Perfect for serious players

If you’re looking for a professional, no-nonsense PvP modpack that gives you the edge without breaking fairness, ElitePvP Fabric is built for you.

Lock in. Focus up. Dominate. ⚔️🔥

With vanillatweaks:
https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/
